context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Athens. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Good morning! What is troubling you?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever
acceptedResponses: Με πονάει το κεφάλι μου και έχω πυρετό
Πονάει το κεφάλι μου και έχω πυρετό

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: How long have you been sick?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Κατάλαβα. Έχετε άλλα συμπτώματα; Βήχα, συνάχι;
exchanges.translation: I see. Do you have other symptoms? Cough, cold?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Θα σας γράψω φάρμακο. Πάρτε το τρεις φορές τη μέρα μετά το φαγητό.
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe medication. Take it three times a day after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Ναι, ελάτε ξανά σε μια εβδομάδα. Αν χειροτερέψει, τηλεφωνήστε αμέσως.
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If it gets worse, call immediately.
